Thanks for the contribution! Please fill in the sections that apply.

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./... -count=1` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -s -w .` applied
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes (or noisy lints are explained)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the changed behaviour
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new heavy / CGO dependencies (or justified above)

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123, refs #456 -->
